title: Remediate test tooling FluentAssertions compatibility
description: Fix FluentAssertions 8.9.0 compile failure in SurfaceChartsDemoViewportBehaviorTests from PR #84.
acceptance_criteria: Videra.Core.Tests passes under PR #84 test tooling update; touched test projects are rerun or bounded follow-up is recorded.
close_reason: Phase 289 remediation complete: FluentAssertions assertion API fixed in commit 5013ff7; Videra.Core.Tests passed. SurfaceCharts Avalonia integration hang recorded as bounded follow-up.

title: Remediate logging dependency downgrade
description: Align direct Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions references required by PR #86 so solution restore no longer fails with NU1605.
acceptance_criteria: Solution restore/build and focused logging tests pass with PR #86; #87 handling remains explicit.
close_reason: Phase 289 remediation complete: logging Abstractions references aligned in commit 5111790; restore, release build, and focused logging tests passed. PR #87 left for Phase 291 policy handling.

title: Remediate analyzer S3267 findings
description: Fix three SonarAnalyzer S3267 findings introduced by PR #85 without suppressions.
acceptance_criteria: Release build passes with SonarAnalyzer 10.24.0.138807 and shared test tooling hygiene remains green.
close_reason: Phase 289 remediation complete: analyzer-induced S3267 findings fixed in commit 63dcc60 without suppressions; release build and shared tooling check passed.

title: Remediate SourceLink package size budget
description: Fix PR #88 release dry-run failure by adjusting Videra.SurfaceCharts.Avalonia snupkg budget or reducing symbol package size.
acceptance_criteria: Release dry-run passes for SourceLink PR #88; package budget change is minimal and justified by exact bytes.
close_reason: Phase 289 remediation complete: SourceLink package-size budget raised to 30720 in commit a9b30bc; release dry-run passed.

title: Verify logging Dependabot PR #86 and supersede #87
description: Verify Microsoft.Extensions.Logging and Abstractions 9.0.11 -> 10.0.7 via PR #86, treating #87 as superseded if #86 remains viable.
acceptance_criteria: Package/runtime compatibility is verified or rejection reason is recorded; #87 supersession path is explicit.
close_reason: Phase 288 logging verification completed: PR #86 fails solution restore with NU1605 due to direct Abstractions 9.0.11 refs; remediation bead Videra-154 created; #87 not closed yet.

title: Verify test tooling Dependabot PR #84
description: Verify FluentAssertions 8.9.0, Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk 18.4.0, and xunit.runner.visualstudio 3.1.5 across test projects.
acceptance_criteria: Test-tooling failures are reproduced or cleared; required source changes are scoped; result is accept/reject with validation command.
close_reason: Phase 288 test-tooling verification completed: PR #84 fails Videra.Core.Tests compile due to BeGreaterOrEqualTo spelling; remediation bead Videra-3gn created.

title: Verify analyzer Dependabot PR #85
description: Verify SonarAnalyzer.CSharp 10.6.0.109712 -> 10.24.0.138807 and identify the quality-gate failure source.
acceptance_criteria: Quality-gate failure is reproduced or cleared; remediation scope is identified if analyzer-induced; result is accept/reject with validation command.
close_reason: Phase 288 analyzer verification completed: PR #85 introduces three S3267 errors; remediation bead Videra-0p9 created.

title: Verify SourceLink Dependabot PR #88
description: Recheck PR #88 Microsoft.SourceLink.GitHub 8.0.0 -> 10.0.203 against current master and record merge readiness.
acceptance_criteria: Current-master compatibility is verified with package evidence/release dry-run relevant checks; no product code changes; result is accept or reject with evidence.
close_reason: Phase 288 SourceLink verification completed: PR #88 is merge-compatible but release dry-run fails on Videra.SurfaceCharts.Avalonia snupkg budget by 14 bytes; remediation bead Videra-c1e created.

title: Phase 291 dependabot merge and cleanup
description: Merge accepted dependency PRs, close superseded/rejected PRs, and clean Beads, Dolt, branch, and worktree state.
acceptance_criteria: Accepted PRs merge only after green checks or explicit acceptance; rejected/superseded PRs are closed with rationale; Beads/Dolt/Git state is clean.

title: Phase 290 CI observation and PR refresh
description: Push or refresh accepted update branches and observe GitHub checks through pass/fail classification.
acceptance_criteria: Accepted PRs/branches are refreshed without planning leakage; checks are observed and failures are converted into targeted Beads follow-ups.

title: Phase 289 targeted dependency remediation
description: Fix only dependency-induced failures through scoped Beads/worktree tasks, or reject updates that require broad compatibility layers.
acceptance_criteria: Each failure has scoped Beads ownership and validation; no broad analyzer suppression, blanket test skip, fallback layer, or unrelated refactor is introduced.
close_reason: Phase 289 complete: four scoped remediation beads closed with local commits and verification evidence; branches left clean for Phase 290 PR refresh.

title: Phase 288 compatibility verification pass
description: Verify accepted dependency updates locally with the narrowest relevant commands and document compatibility evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Analyzer/test-tooling and runtime/package updates have targeted verification evidence, warnings/API breaks/transitive changes recorded, and rejection reasons captured where applicable.
close_reason: Phase 288 completed: all dependency verification tracks finished and targeted Phase 289 remediation beads were created.

title: Phase 287 dependabot PR inventory and decision matrix
description: Capture the open Dependabot PR set, package overlap, mergeability, and merge/replace/close decisions before modifying branches.
acceptance_criteria: Open PRs #84-#88 are inventoried with package/version/file/status data; overlap and supersession decisions are recorded; no product/package changes are made during inventory.
close_reason: Phase 287 completed: Dependabot PRs #84-#88 inventoried, overlap and decisions recorded, and Phase 288 verification child beads created.

title: Phase 285 targeted CI remediation
description: Fix failing checks through small independently owned Beads tasks and narrow local verification.
close_reason: Phase 285 completed as no-op: PR #94 checks passed, so no targeted CI remediation was required.

title: Phase 286 merge and branch cleanup

title: Phase 284 CI observation and failure triage
description: Observe required GitHub checks and convert failures into scoped Beads follow-up issues.
close_reason: Phase 284 completed: observed PR #94 CI to completion; all checks passed and no remediation beads were needed.

close_reason: Phase 282 completed: verified Docker-backed Beads context, GitHub Dolt remote, non-interactive Docker Dolt push path, and clean Dolt/Git handoff state.

title: Phase 280 targeted CI remediation
description: Fix failing checks through small independently owned Beads tasks and narrow local verification.
close_reason: Superseded by v2.36 Beads Remote Sync PR Closure; same PR/CI intent continues with explicit remote-sync baseline.

title: Phase 279 CI observation and failure triage

close_reason: Superseded by v2.36 Beads Remote Sync PR Closure; same PR/CI intent continues with explicit remote-sync baseline.

close_reason: Superseded by v2.36 Beads Remote Sync PR Closure; same PR/CI intent continues with explicit remote-sync baseline.

title: Phase 277 coordination validation and guardrails

close_reason: Phase 277 completed: added explicit Beads coordination validation script, docs boundary, and focused repository guardrail tests.

close_reason: Phase 276 completed: proved create/claim/discovered-from/close lifecycle, Docker-backed dependency observation, and Git-vs-Dolt handoff documentation.

title: Phase 275 worktree coordination contract

close_reason: Phase 275 completed: documented Beads worktree redirects, validation commands, and branch isolation rules after validating an existing redirected worktree.

title: Proof discovered follow-up for Beads lifecycle
